projectDescription: A gamified online learning platform where learners take project-based courses, earn XP, build streaks, unlock achievements, and compete on leaderboards.
keyFeatures: Project-based video course catalog powered by YouTube playlists
XP and level progression system (sqrt-based level formula)
Daily learning streaks with automatic tracking
Achievement unlock system with multiple criteria types (lessons, courses, streak)
Global leaderboard ranked by total XP
Interactive dashboard with bento-style stats overview
publicApiSurface: GET /api/courses — list all courses with enrollment status
GET /api/courses/[courseId] — course details with lesson progress
POST /api/progress — mark a lesson complete/incomplete and award XP
GET /api/achievements — list all achievements with earned status
GET /api/leaderboard — ranked leaderboard with current user rank
GET /api/user/stats — full dashboard stats for signed-in user
POST /api/user/sync — sync Clerk user profile into the database
